item.description:
Sukoon 1.4 — the biggest update yet, and the first notarized release (no more security warnings on install).

  • Meeting-aware adhan — silences itself when your microphone is in use, so the adhan never interrupts a call.
  • Mark prayed from the notification — log a prayer without opening anything.
  • Tap-to-log on widgets — check off prayers right on the widget.
  • After-adhan dua — the panel lingers with the dua between adhan and iqama.
  • Travel mode — suggests the locally-used calculation method when you change country.
  • Precise location (opt-in) — exact times via Location Services; your location never leaves your Mac.
  • Shortcuts & Siri — Next Prayer, Log Prayer, and automation recipes.
  • Four new languages — اردو, Türkçe, Bahasa Indonesia, Français.
  • Year in review — yearly stats with a shareable card, plus live adhan phrase tracking, offline fallback, and better first-run screens.
Sukoon 1.3 — Arabic widget faces (widgets now follow the app language), plus automatic silent updates via Sparkle.
